title: jacea × livonica
intro: Jacea × livonica, also known as meadow sweet, is a hybrid plant species of Achillea millefolium and Achillea ptarmica, belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm the digestive system and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Jacea × livonica include reducing menstrual cramps and spasms, alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and acting as a natural diuretic. Meadow sweet is often prepared as an herbal tea, infused in hot water to release its active compounds, or used in tinctures, capsules, and salves to support overall well-being.
